channel.title: Error: Cannot read property 'latest' of undefined
channel.description:
❯ npx frontity create my-first-frontity-project ? Pick a starter theme to clone: @frontity/mars-theme (recommended) ✔ Creating README.md. ✖ Creating package.json.
Error: Cannot read property 'latest' of undefined
How To Fix This ?

item.title: Error: Cannot read property 'latest' of undefined
item.dc:creator: manekainduwara
item.description:
❯ npx frontity create my-first-frontity-project
? Pick a starter theme to clone: @frontity/mars-theme (recommended)
Creating README.md.
Creating package.json.

Error: Cannot read property ‘latest’ of undefined

How To Fix This ?

Read full topic
item.source: Error: Cannot read property 'latest' of undefined
